problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
mechanism: Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations
hypothesis: If Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations is applied to or, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 36 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
